pi_items.source: Task description specifies style must be named 'river_casing' in 'ne' workspace
Environment setup creates 'ne' workspace and publishes ne_rivers layer there; task.json description confirms 'ne:ne_rivers' layer
Task description specifies 'Scale > 1:35,000,000' and 'Scale <= 1:35,000,000' as breakpoint for cased line rendering
Task description requires '#4292c6' for simple line at scales > 1:35,000,000. This is the 6th color in ColorBrewer's Blues 9-class sequential palette (verified via https://colorbrewer2.org/)
Task description requires '#08306b' for outer casing stroke at regional scale. This is the 9th (darkest) color in ColorBrewer's Blues 9-class sequential palette
Task description requires '#deebf7' for inner core stroke at regional scale. This is the 2nd (lightest) color in ColorBrewer's Blues 9-class sequential palette
Task description specifies 'width 1.0' for global scale simple line
Task description specifies 'width 4.0' for casing (outer stroke)
Task description specifies 'width 2.0' for core (inner stroke)
Task description requires 'Generate a WMS GetMap image (PNG) ... save it to /home/ga/output/rivers_regional.png'

Natural Earth 110m Rivers Lake Centerlines dataset includes 'name' and 'name_*' (multilingual) attributes for river/lake identification (verified via https://www.naturalearthdata.com/downloads/110m-physical-vectors/110m-rivers-lake-centerlines/)
Environment setup_geoserver.sh downloads and imports ne_110m_rivers_lake_centerlines.shp from Natural Earth; README confirms 'Real Data: Natural Earth 110m shapefiles'
README evidence_docs states: 'ne_rivers (13 records, MultiLineString)' after PostGIS import via ogr2ogr
README evidence_docs confirms 'ne_rivers (13 records, MultiLineString)' in PostGIS database after import

privileged_info_summary: Task creates a scale-dependent cased line SLD style for Natural Earth 110m rivers (ne_rivers layer, 13 MultiLineString features with 'name' attribute). Style uses ColorBrewer Blues palette colors (#4292c6 global, #08306b casing, #deebf7 core) and implements two rendering modes: simple 1.0-width line at scales > 1:35,000,000, and double-stroke casing (4.0-width dark outline with 2.0-width light core) with Arial 12 labels at scales ≤ 1:35,000,000. Output verified via WMS GetMap PNG of South America region.
